hero.subtitle: Free-Input Rhythm Game — Play with a Controller from Your Couch! A Brand-New Rhythm Experience Arrives Early 2027!

rechor.name: Rechor
rechor.desc: A maintenance robot of unknown origin, tirelessly tending to equipment and tidying rooms... always fumbling into clumsy little accidents, yet seemingly built sturdy enough to never really get hurt. Polite and gentle in manner, but now and then her expression slips into something harder to read — as if she were hiding some extraordinary secret.

eiria.name: Eiria
eiria.desc: A carefree, energetic girl who seems to come from somewhere unusual — could she actually be a young lady of high birth? She's utterly determined to push forward the Tuning Project, though it often looks more like she's just bossing people around. Her obsession with games and snacks is worrying; the lonely look that slips through now and then makes it hard to look away.

tune.title: TUNE - Tuning Mode
tune.desc:
A complete reinvention of traditional rhythm games!
No fixed keys — only free expression:
Under the rules of "Note Affinity", play the melody your way, with the fingering you love most.

fight.title: Fight - Battle Mode
fight.desc:
Battle to the melody — against formidable foes, or perhaps old friends.
Attack, defend, unleash your Finishing Move — everything flows to the music.
Ride the rhythm, duel with conviction, and fight to save the world!
